title: 5.59ct Lab-Grown Emerald Halo Ring S925 JSEGR489Y
description:
Product Description:

Embrace luxury with this stunning lab-grown emerald ring, beautifully crafted with a sophisticated halo design in S925 sterling silver. Known for its durability and hypoallergenic properties, this sterling silver setting ensures both quality and comfort for daily wear.

At the heart of this ring lies an impressive 10x14mm, 5.59-carat oval-cut lab-grown emerald, exuding a vibrant green hue that symbolizes elegance and renewal. Encircling the central gem are two rows of brilliant round-cut accent stones, adding an additional 2.29 carats of sparkle. The band itself features a half-circle of round-cut accents, completing the design with an extra layer of radiance. This ring weighs 6.01 grams and is available in U.S. sizes 5 to 7.5. Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings ship within 3-15 days.

Key Features:

Lab-Grown Emerald Center Stone: A captivating 10x14mm, 5.59-carat oval-cut emerald, symbolizing luxury and timeless beauty.

Halo Design with Double Row Accents: Surrounded by two rows of sparkling round-cut stones, adding depth and brilliance.

S925 Sterling Silver: High-quality, hypoallergenic, and resistant to tarnishing for lasting wear.

Elegant Band Detailing: Half-circle of round-cut accents on the band for an added touch of sophistication.

Available Sizes: U.S. ring sizes 5 to 7.5 for a perfect fit.

Shipping: Lab-grown colored gemstones have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

This ring offers a blend of opulence and timeless beauty, making it a striking statement piece and a cherished addition to any jewelry collection.
